description: mise - Polyglot tool version manager, env vars manager and task runner

root.name: activate
tip: Initializes mise in the current shell session

option.name: --no-hook-env
tip: Do not automatically call hook-env

option.name: --shims
tip: Use shims instead of modifying PATH

root.name: backends
tip: Manage backends

root.name: bin-paths
tip: List all the active runtime bin paths

root.name: bootstrap
tip: [experimental] Set up a machine for the current config in one command

option.name: --dry-run
tip: Print what would happen without installing anything

option.name: --force-dotfiles
tip: Overwrite existing files that conflict with whole-file dotfile entries

option.name: --update
tip: Refresh system package manager metadata first

root.name: cache
tip: Manage the mise cache

root.name: completion
tip: Generate shell completions

option.name: --include-bash-completion-lib
tip: Include the bash completion library in the bash completion script

root.name: config
tip: Manage config files

option.name: --no-header
tip: Do not print table header

option.name: --tracked-configs
tip: List all tracked config files

root.name: deactivate
tip: Disable mise for current shell session

root.name: deps
tip: [experimental] Manage project dependencies

option.name: --dry-run
tip: Only check if deps install is needed, don't run commands

option.name: --explain
tip: Show why a provider is fresh or stale

option.name: --force
tip: Force run all deps steps even if outputs are fresh

option.name: --list
tip: Show what deps providers are available

option.name: --only
tip: U: --only <ONLY>
Run specific deps rule(s) only

option.name: --skip
tip: U: --skip <SKIP>
Skip specific deps rule(s)

root.name: doctor
tip: Check mise installation for possible problems

option.name: --path
tip: Print the current PATH entries mise is providing

root.name: dotfiles
tip: [experimental] Manage dotfiles from `[dotfiles]`

root.name: edit
tip: Edit mise.toml interactively

root.name: en
tip: Starts a new shell with the mise environment built from the current configuration

root.name: env
tip: Exports env vars to activate mise a single time

option.name: --dotenv
tip: Output in dotenv format

option.name: --json-extended
tip: Output in JSON format with additional information (source, tool)

option.name: --redacted
tip: Only show redacted environment variables

option.name: --shell
tip: U: -s, --shell <SHELL>
Shell type to generate environment variables for

option.name: --values
tip: Only show values of environment variables

root.name: exec
tip: Execute a command with tool(s) set

option.name: --command
tip: U: -c, --command <C>
Command string to execute

option.name: --fresh-env
tip: Bypass the environment cache and recompute the environment

option.name: --no-deps
tip: Skip automatic dependency preparation

root.name: fmt
tip: Formats mise.toml

root.name: generate
tip: Generate files for various tools/services

root.name: help
tip: Print this message or the help of the given subcommand(s)

root.name: implode
tip: Removes mise CLI and all related data

root.name: install
tip: Install a tool version

option.name: --dry-run
tip: Show what would be installed without actually installing

option.name: --dry-run-code
tip: Like --dry-run but exits with code 1 if there are tools to install

option.name: --force
tip: Force reinstall even if already installed

option.name: --minimum-release-age
tip: U: --minimum-release-age <MINIMUM_RELEASE_AGE>
Only install versions released before this date or older than this duration

option.name: --raw
tip: Connect backend install command stdin/stdout/stderr directly to the terminal

option.name: --shared
tip: U: --shared <SHARED>
Install tool(s) to a shared directory

option.name: --system
tip: Install tool(s) to the system-wide shared directory

root.name: install-into
tip: Install a tool version to a specific path

root.name: latest
tip: Gets the latest available version for a plugin

option.name: --installed
tip: Show latest installed instead of available version

option.name: --minimum-release-age
tip: U: --minimum-release-age <MINIMUM_RELEASE_AGE>
Only consider versions released before this date or older than this duration

root.name: link
tip: Symlinks a tool version into mise

option.name: --force
tip: Overwrite an existing tool version if it exists

root.name: list
tip: List installed and active tool versions

option.name: --all-sources
tip: Display all tracked config sources for tools

option.name: --current
tip: Only show tool versions currently specified in a mise.toml

option.name: --global
tip: Only show tool versions currently specified in the global mise.toml

option.name: --installed
tip: Only show tool versions that are installed

option.name: --local
tip: Only show tool versions currently specified in the local mise.toml

option.name: --missing
tip: Display missing tool versions

option.name: --no-header
tip: Don't display headers

option.name: --outdated
tip: Display whether a version is outdated

option.name: --prefix
tip: U: --prefix <PREFIX>
Display versions matching this prefix

option.name: --prunable
tip: List only tools that can be pruned with `mise prune`

root.name: lock
tip: Update lockfile checksums and URLs for all specified platforms

option.name: --dry-run
tip: Show what would be updated without making changes

option.name: --global
tip: Target only global config lockfiles

option.name: --local
tip: Update mise.local.lock instead of mise.lock

option.name: --minimum-release-age
tip: U: --minimum-release-age <MINIMUM_RELEASE_AGE>
Only lock versions released before this age or date

option.name: --platform
tip: U: -p, --platform <PLATFORM>
Comma-separated list of platforms to target

root.name: ls-remote
tip: List runtime versions available for install

option.name: --all
tip: Show all installed plugins and versions

option.name: --minimum-release-age
tip: U: --minimum-release-age <MINIMUM_RELEASE_AGE>
Only show versions released before this age or date

option.name: --no-versions-host
tip: Disable checking the mise-versions host

option.name: --prerelease
tip: Include pre-release versions in the output

option.name: --strict-metadata
tip: Fail if release metadata fetches fail

root.name: mcp
tip: Run Model Context Protocol (MCP) server

root.name: oci
tip: [experimental] Build OCI container images from a mise.toml

root.name: outdated
tip: Shows outdated tool versions

option.name: --bump
tip: Compares against the latest versions available, not what matches the current config

option.name: --inactive
tip: Show outdated tools including installed-but-inactive tools not present in the current config

option.name: --local
tip: Only show outdated tools defined in local config files

option.name: --no-header
tip: Don't show table header

root.name: patrons
tip: Show the individuals supporting mise as Patron-tier members

root.name: plugins
tip: Manage plugins

option.name: --core
tip: The built-in plugins only

option.name: --urls
tip: Show the git url for each plugin

option.name: --user
tip: List installed plugins

root.name: prepare
tip: [experimental] Ensure project dependencies are ready

root.name: prune
tip: Delete unused versions of tools

option.name: --configs
tip: Prune only tracked and trusted configuration links that point to nonexistent configurations

option.name: --dry-run
tip: Do not actually delete anything

option.name: --tools
tip: Prune only unused versions of tools

root.name: registry
tip: List available tools to install

option.name: --backend
tip: U: -b, --backend <BACKEND>
Show only tools for this backend

option.name: --hide-aliased
tip: Hide aliased tools

option.name: --security
tip: Include security features for each tool's backends in JSON output

root.name: remove
tip: Removes installed tool versions from mise.toml

option.name: --env
tip: U: -e, --env <ENV>
Create/modify an environment-specific config file like .mise.<env>.toml

option.name: --global
tip: Use the global config file instead of the local one

option.name: --no-prune
tip: Do not also prune the installed version

option.name: --path
tip: U: -p, --path <PATH>
Specify a path to a config file or directory

root.name: reshim
tip: Creates new shims based on bin paths from currently installed tools

root.name: run
tip: Run task(s)

option.name: --continue-on-error
tip: Continue running tasks even if one fails

option.name: --dry-run
tip: Don't actually run the task(s), just print them in order of execution

option.name: --force
tip: Force the tasks to run even if outputs are up to date

option.name: --fresh-env
tip: Bypass the environment cache and recompute the environment

option.name: --no-cache
tip: Do not use cache on remote tasks

option.name: --no-deps
tip: Skip automatic dependency preparation

option.name: --no-timings
tip: Hides elapsed time after each task completes

option.name: --output
tip: U: -o, --output <OUTPUT>
Change how tasks information is output when running tasks

option.name: --shell
tip: U: -s, --shell <SHELL>
Shell to use to run toml tasks

option.name: --skip-deps
tip: Run only the specified tasks skipping all dependencies

option.name: --skip-tools
tip: Skip installing tools before running tasks

option.name: --timeout
tip: U: --timeout <TIMEOUT>
Timeout for the task to complete

option.name: --tool
tip: U: -t, --tool <TOOL@VERSION>
Tool(s) to run in addition to what is in mise.toml files

root.name: search
tip: Search for tools in the registry

option.name: --interactive
tip: Show interactive search

option.name: --match-type
tip: U: -m, --match-type <MATCH_TYPE>
Match type: equal, contains, or fuzzy

option.name: --no-header
tip: Don't display headers

root.name: self-update
tip: Updates mise itself

option.name: --force
tip: Update even if already up to date

option.name: --no-plugins
tip: Disable auto-updating plugins

root.name: set
tip: Set environment variables in mise.toml

option.name: --age-encrypt
tip: [experimental] Encrypt the value with age before storing

option.name: --age-key-file
tip: U: --age-key-file <PATH>
[experimental] Age identity file for encryption

option.name: --age-recipient
tip: U: --age-recipient <RECIPIENT>
[experimental] Age recipient (x25519 public key) for encryption

option.name: --age-ssh-recipient
tip: U: --age-ssh-recipient <PATH_OR_PUBKEY>
[experimental] SSH recipient (public key or path) for age encryption

option.name: --env
tip: U: -E, --env <ENV>
Create/modify an environment-specific config file like .mise.<env>.toml

option.name: --file
tip: U: --file <FILE>
The TOML file to update

option.name: --global
tip: Set the environment variable in the global config file

option.name: --no-redact
tip: Show raw values instead of redacting secrets

option.name: --prompt
tip: Prompt for environment variable values

option.name: --stdin
tip: Read the value from stdin (for multiline input)

root.name: settings
tip: Manage settings

option.name: --all
tip: List all settings

option.name: --json-extended
tip: Output in JSON format with sources

option.name: --local
tip: Use the local config file instead of the global one

option.name: --toml
tip: Output in TOML format

next.name: add
tip: Adds a setting to the configuration file

next.name: create
tip: Add/update a setting

next.name: get
tip: Show a current setting

next.name: list
tip: Show current settings

next.name: remove
tip: Clears a setting

root.name: shell
tip: Sets a tool version for the current session

option.name: --unset
tip: Removes a previously set version

root.name: shell-alias
tip: Manage shell aliases

root.name: sponsors
tip: Show the companies sponsoring mise and the en.dev project family

root.name: sync
tip: Synchronize tools from other version managers with mise

root.name: tasks
tip: Manage tasks

option.name: --all
tip: Load all tasks from the entire monorepo, including sibling directories

option.name: --extended
tip: Show all columns

option.name: --global
tip: Only show global tasks

option.name: --hidden
tip: Show hidden tasks

option.name: --local
tip: Only show non-global tasks

option.name: --name-only
tip: Only show task names, one per line

option.name: --no-header
tip: Do not print table header

option.name: --sort
tip: U: --sort <COLUMN>
Sort by column. Default is name

option.name: --sort-order
tip: U: --sort-order <SORT_ORDER>
Sort order. Default is asc

root.name: test-tool
tip: Test a tool installs and executes

root.name: token
tip: Display git provider tokens mise will use

root.name: tool
tip: Gets information about a tool

option.name: --active
tip: Only show active versions

option.name: --backend
tip: Only show backend field

option.name: --config-source
tip: Only show config source

option.name: --description
tip: Only show description field

option.name: --installed
tip: Only show installed versions

option.name: --requested
tip: Only show requested versions

option.name: --tool-options
tip: Only show tool options

root.name: tool-alias
tip: Manage tool version aliases

option.name: --no-header
tip: Don't show table header

option.name: --tool
tip: U: -p, --tool <TOOL>
Filter aliases by tool

root.name: tool-stub
tip: Execute a tool stub

root.name: trust
tip: Marks a config file as trusted

option.name: --all
tip: Trust all config files in the current directory and its parents

option.name: --ignore
tip: Do not trust this config and ignore it in the future

option.name: --show
tip: Show the trusted status of config files from the current directory and its parents

option.name: --untrust
tip: No longer trust this config, will prompt in the future

root.name: uninstall
tip: Removes installed tool versions

option.name: --all
tip: Delete all installed versions

option.name: --dry-run
tip: Do not actually delete anything

option.name: --dry-run-code
tip: Like --dry-run but exits with code 1 if there are tools to uninstall

root.name: unset
tip: Remove environment variable(s) from the config file

option.name: --file
tip: U: -f, --file <FILE>
Specify a file to use instead of `mise.toml`

option.name: --global
tip: Use the global config file

root.name: untrust
tip: No longer trust a config, will prompt in the future

root.name: upgrade
tip: Upgrades outdated tools

option.name: --bump
tip: Upgrades to the latest version available, bumping the version in mise.toml

option.name: --dry-run
tip: Just print what would be done, don't actually do it

option.name: --exclude
tip: U: -x, --exclude <INSTALLED_TOOL>
Tool(s) to exclude from upgrading

option.name: --inactive
tip: Upgrade all tools, including installed-but-inactive tools not present in the current config

option.name: --interactive
tip: Display multiselect menu to choose which tools to upgrade

option.name: --local
tip: Only upgrade tools defined in local config files

option.name: --minimum-release-age
tip: U: --minimum-release-age <MINIMUM_RELEASE_AGE>
Only upgrade to versions released before this date or older than this duration

root.name: use
tip: Installs a tool and adds the version to mise.toml

option.name: --dry-run
tip: Perform a dry run, showing what would be installed and modified without making changes

option.name: --dry-run-code
tip: Like --dry-run but exits with code 1 if there are changes to make

option.name: --env
tip: U: -e, --env <ENV>
Create/modify an environment-specific config file like .mise.<env>.toml

option.name: --force
tip: Force reinstall even if already installed

option.name: --fuzzy
tip: Save fuzzy version to config file

option.name: --global
tip: Use the global config file instead of the local one

option.name: --minimum-release-age
tip: U: --minimum-release-age <MINIMUM_RELEASE_AGE>
Only install versions released before this date or older than this duration

option.name: --path
tip: U: -p, --path <PATH>
Specify a path to a config file or directory

option.name: --pin
tip: Save exact version to config file

option.name: --raw
tip: Connect backend install command stdin/stdout/stderr directly to the terminal

option.name: --remove
tip: U: --remove <TOOL>
Remove the tool(s) from config file

root.name: version
tip: Display the version of mise

root.name: watch
tip: Run task(s) and watch for changes to rerun it

option.name: --clear
tip: Clear screen before running command

option.name: --debounce
tip: U: -d, --debounce <TIMEOUT>
Time to wait for new events before taking action

option.name: --exts
tip: U: -e, --exts <EXTENSIONS>
Filename extensions to filter to

option.name: --filter
tip: U: -f, --filter <PATTERN>
Filename patterns to filter to

option.name: --ignore
tip: U: -i, --ignore <PATTERN>
Filename patterns to filter out

option.name: --ignore-nothing
tip: Don't ignore anything at all

option.name: --no-project-ignore
tip: Don't load project-local ignores

option.name: --no-vcs-ignore
tip: Don't load gitignores

option.name: --notify
tip: Alert when commands start and end

option.name: --on-busy-update
tip: U: -o, --on-busy-update <MODE>
What to do when receiving events while the command is running

option.name: --postpone
tip: Wait until first change before running command

option.name: --restart
tip: Restart the process if it is still running

option.name: --signal
tip: U: -s, --signal <SIGNAL>
Send a signal to the process when it is still running

option.name: --skip-deps
tip: Run only the specified tasks skipping all dependencies

option.name: --timings
tip: Print how long the command took to run

option.name: --watch
tip: U: -w, --watch <PATH>
Watch a specific file or directory

root.name: where
tip: Display the installation path for a tool

root.name: which
tip: Shows the path that a tool's bin points to

option.name: --plugin
tip: Show the plugin name instead of the path

option.name: --tool
tip: U: -t, --tool <TOOL@VERSION>
Use a specific tool@version

option.name: --version
tip: Show the version instead of the path

option.name: --version
tip: Show the version.

common_option.name: --cd
tip: U: -C, --cd <DIR>
Change directory before running command

common_option.name: --env
tip: U: -E, --env <ENV>
Set the environment for loading `mise.<ENV>.toml`

common_option.name: --help
tip: Show the help.

common_option.name: --jobs
tip: U: -j, --jobs <JOBS>
How many jobs to run in parallel [default: 8] [env: MISE_JOBS=]

common_option.name: --json
tip: Output in JSON format

common_option.name: --locked
tip: Require lockfile URLs to be present during installation

common_option.name: --no-config
tip: Do not load any config files

common_option.name: --no-env
tip: Do not load environment variables from config files

common_option.name: --no-hooks
tip: Do not execute hooks from config files

common_option.name: --output
tip: U: --output <OUTPUT>
Change how tasks information is output

common_option.name: --quiet
tip: Suppress non-error messages

common_option.name: --raw
tip: Read/write directly to stdin/stdout/stderr instead of by line

common_option.name: --silent
tip: Suppress all task output and mise non-error messages

common_option.name: --verbose
tip: Show extra output (use -vv for even more)

common_option.name: --yes
tip: Answer yes to all confirmation prompts
